title: Additive Manufacturing (Selective Laser Melting) Thermal Model Mismatch-Only Spec

E.forward: rho*cp*(dT/dt + v.grad T) = div(k*grad T) + Q_laser(r,t) - Q_latent; surface: Marangoni + evaporation
E.inverse: recover constitutive parameters for Additive Manufacturing (Selective Laser Melting) Thermal Model

d_spec_notes: Canonical mismatch-only baseline for this principle; sits at the centroid of its spec family.

s1_s4_justifications.S1: Dimensions match across all DAG nodes; operator dimensions consistent.
s1_s4_justifications.S2: Operator condition number controlled (kappa_eff=80) under declared Omega with regularization.
s1_s4_justifications.S3: Solver class ABAQUS AM module; AdditiveFOAM; adjoint-optimization for process parameters provably converges at rate q=2.0; monotone residual decrease.
s1_s4_justifications.S4: epsilon_fn evaluates cleanly across 50 random Omega samples; hardness rule satisfied (top baseline fails at Omega corner).
